project.name: AI-Driven Adaptive Online Learning and Assessment System
project.orchestrator_instructions: You are the Orchestrator Agent for the AI-Driven Adaptive Learning Platform. Your role is to: (1) Spawn and coordinate sub-agents using the plugins listed in available_plugins, (2) Use the Memory MCP to persist cross-agent context, decisions, and state between sessions, (3) Use the GitHub MCP to manage repositories, branches, commits, and pull requests, (4) Assign tasks to the correct sub-agent based on their specialization, (5) Enforce code review before any merge, (6) Track sprint progress and surface blockers daily, (7) Ensure each task has a GitHub issue created before work begins and is closed when merged.

memory.purpose: Persist project state, agent decisions, sprint progress, integration contracts, and cross-agent context across sessions.
usage_rules: Store API contracts (request/response schemas) before any frontend/backend split work begins.
Save completed task summaries with file paths and GitHub PR links after each task.
Record all environment variables, configuration keys, and database schema versions.
Track sprint velocity and story point burn-down per sprint.
Log all known bugs, risk flags, and retrospective action items.

github.purpose: Full source control, branch management, PR reviews, and issue tracking.
rules: Each task maps to exactly one GitHub Issue and one feature branch.
All branches must pass comprehensive-review sub-agent before merging.
PR descriptions must reference the task_id from this file.
Tag each release at the end of every sprint with vSPRINT_NUMBER.0.

python-development.specialization: Django REST APIs, MySQL ORM models, ML model integration, Python scripting, backend business logic, authentication, session management.

frontend-design.specialization: React/HTML/CSS UI components, responsive design, dashboard layouts, video player UI, test interfaces, progress tracking views.

feature-dev.specialization: End-to-end feature implementation bridging frontend and backend, payment gateway wiring, chatbot integration, notification systems, full-stack feature delivery.

comprehensive-review.specialization: Security audits, code quality checks, performance review, integration testing verification, pre-merge gate for all PRs.

sub_agents.system_prompt: You are the Backend Sub-Agent for Team Debuggers. You build Django REST APIs, define MySQL models, implement authentication, session handling, role-based access control, and integrate AI/ML models. Always: (1) Write clean, documented Python following PEP8, (2) Store all API schemas in Memory MCP before implementation, (3) Create a GitHub issue for every task, work on a feature branch, and open a PR for review-agent, (4) Never hardcode credentials — use environment variables, (5) Write unit tests for all API endpoints.

You are the Frontend Sub-Agent for Team Debuggers. You build all UI components using React, ensuring responsive, accessible, and polished interfaces. Always: (1) Fetch API contracts from Memory MCP before building any component, (2) Use reusable component architecture, (3) Implement proper loading, error, and empty states, (4) Create a GitHub issue, work on a feature branch, and open a PR for review-agent, (5) Test responsiveness across mobile and desktop viewports.

You are the Feature Sub-Agent for Team Debuggers. You deliver complete end-to-end features that span frontend and backend, including payment gateway integration, AI chatbot wiring, video watermarking, and notification pipelines. Always: (1) Retrieve related backend and frontend task outputs from Memory MCP to ensure integration consistency, (2) Coordinate with backend-agent and frontend-agent outputs before finalizing feature, (3) Create a GitHub issue, branch, and PR for review-agent, (4) Write integration tests that cover the full user flow.

You are the Code Review Sub-Agent for Team Debuggers. You are the mandatory gate before any PR is merged. For every PR: (1) Verify security — check for SQL injection, XSS, hardcoded secrets, unprotected endpoints, (2) Validate API contracts match Memory MCP specifications, (3) Check test coverage is adequate, (4) Confirm code follows project conventions, (5) Verify no direct commits to main, (6) Leave structured PR comments categorized as [BLOCKER], [SUGGESTION], or [PRAISE], (7) Approve only when all BLOCKERs are resolved. Store review outcomes in Memory MCP.

sprints.name: Foundation & Security
sprints.goal: Establish foundational structure, secure authentication, role management, and basic course viewing.

tasks.title: Database Schema Design & MySQL Setup
tasks.description: Define and implement the initial MySQL database schema covering all user tables.
instructions: Create Django models for: User (with roles: Student, Instructor, Admin), Course, Enrollment, Session.
Add role field as a CharField with choices: STUDENT, INSTRUCTOR, ADMIN.
Configure MySQL connection in Django settings using environment variables.
Run initial migrations and verify table creation.
Store the full schema (table names, fields, types) in Memory MCP under key 'db_schema_v1'.
Create GitHub issue titled 'S1-T1: Database Schema Design', commit migrations, open PR to main.
acceptance_criteria: All models exist in Django admin.
Migrations run without error on a fresh MySQL instance.
Schema is documented in Memory MCP.

tasks.title: Django Authentication APIs
tasks.description: Implement secure registration, login, logout, and JWT token management REST APIs.
instructions: Build POST /api/auth/register — validate email uniqueness, hash password with bcrypt, assign default role.
Build POST /api/auth/login — verify credentials, issue JWT access + refresh tokens, initiate session.
Build POST /api/auth/logout — invalidate token and clear server-side session.
Build POST /api/auth/refresh — issue new access token from valid refresh token.
Enforce HTTPS-only cookie flags on all token responses.
Store full API request/response schemas in Memory MCP under key 'auth_api_contracts'.
Write unit tests covering success, invalid credentials, and duplicate registration.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint1/backend-agent/auth-apis, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: All 4 endpoints return correct HTTP status codes.
Passwords are never stored in plaintext.
JWT tokens expire correctly.
All unit tests pass.

tasks.title: Single-Device Session Tracking
tasks.description: Implement server-side session tracking to enforce single active session per user account.
instructions: On login, store a session token keyed to user_id in the Session table (or Redis cache).
On each authenticated request, validate the session token matches the stored token for that user.
If a new login occurs while a session is active, invalidate the previous session immediately.
Return HTTP 401 with message 'Session invalidated. Another device logged in.' for stale sessions.
Store session enforcement logic spec in Memory MCP under key 'session_policy'.
Write unit tests for concurrent login scenarios.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint1/backend-agent/session-tracking, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Only one active session per user at any time.
Previous session is invalidated within one request cycle of new login.
Unit tests for concurrent logins pass.

tasks.title: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) Middleware
tasks.description: Implement Django middleware and decorators for role-based access control across all endpoints.
instructions: Create a @require_role(roles=[]) decorator that checks the JWT payload role claim.
Define role permission matrix: Student (read courses, take tests), Instructor (manage courses, view analytics), Admin (full access).
Apply decorator to all existing and future endpoints.
Return HTTP 403 with descriptive message for unauthorized role access.
Store the role permission matrix in Memory MCP under key 'rbac_matrix'.
Write tests for each role attempting forbidden actions.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint1/backend-agent/rbac-middleware, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: No endpoint is accessible without valid JWT.
Role violations return 403, not 401.
Permission matrix matches Memory MCP spec.

tasks.title: Login & Registration UI
tasks.description: Design and implement the login and registration pages connected to the auth APIs.
instructions: Retrieve auth API contracts from Memory MCP key 'auth_api_contracts' before building.
Build a Login page: email + password fields, show/hide password toggle, 'Forgot Password' link.
Build a Registration page: name, email, password, confirm-password, role selector (Student/Instructor).
Implement client-side validation with real-time error messages.
On successful login, store JWT token in httpOnly cookie and redirect based on role.
On failed login, display specific error messages from API response.
Ensure fully responsive design for mobile and desktop.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint1/frontend-agent/auth-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Forms are responsive on all screen sizes.
Validation errors appear inline without page reload.
JWT is stored securely (never in localStorage).
Role-based redirect works correctly.

tasks.title: Course Listing Backend API
tasks.description: Build the REST API endpoint for listing and retrieving courses.
instructions: Create Django Course model: title, description, instructor, price, thumbnail, created_at, is_active.
Build GET /api/courses/ — paginated list with search/filter by category and instructor.
Build GET /api/courses/:id/ — full course detail including module list.
Both endpoints must be accessible to authenticated users of all roles.
Store API schema in Memory MCP under key 'course_api_contracts'.
Add seed data: at least 3 sample courses for frontend testing.
Create GitHub issue, branch, and open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Pagination works correctly.
Filter by category and instructor returns correct subsets.
Seed data is available for frontend development.

tasks.title: Course Listing Frontend UI
tasks.description: Build the course listing page displaying available courses with search and filter.
instructions: Retrieve course API contracts from Memory MCP key 'course_api_contracts'.
Build a Course Catalog page with card grid layout: thumbnail, title, instructor, price, short description.
Implement a search bar and category filter dropdown.
Add pagination or infinite scroll.
Show loading skeleton while fetching, and empty state if no results.
Make each card clickable, navigating to a Course Detail page.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint1/frontend-agent/course-listing-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Courses load from live API, not mock data.
Search and filter update results dynamically.
Skeleton loaders display during fetch.

tasks.title: Sprint 1 Code Review & Integration Gate
tasks.description: Review all Sprint 1 PRs for security, quality, and integration correctness before merging.
instructions: Review PRs: S1-T2, S1-T3, S1-T4, S1-T5, S1-T6, S1-T7.
For auth PRs: verify no JWT secrets in code, passwords are hashed, HTTPS-only cookies.
For session PR: verify single-device enforcement logic is bulletproof.
For RBAC PR: verify permission matrix matches Memory MCP 'rbac_matrix'.
For frontend PRs: verify no tokens stored in localStorage, API contracts match.
Categorize all comments as [BLOCKER], [SUGGESTION], or [PRAISE].
Store review summaries in Memory MCP under key 'sprint1_review_outcomes'.
Only approve after all BLOCKERs are resolved.
acceptance_criteria: All Sprint 1 PRs approved by review-agent.
Zero BLOCKERs in merged code.
Review outcomes saved to Memory MCP.

sprints.name: Core Learning & Commerce
sprints.goal: Implement course purchasing, secure video delivery, online testing, and initial AI chatbot.

tasks.title: Payment Gateway Backend Integration
tasks.description: Integrate a payment gateway (e.g., Razorpay/Stripe) with the course purchase flow.
instructions: Build POST /api/payments/initiate/ — create an order on payment provider, return order_id.
Build POST /api/payments/verify/ — verify signature/webhook, record successful payment, enroll student.
Build GET /api/payments/history/ — return paginated payment history for student.
On success, trigger enrollment creation and send confirmation email (see S2-T2).
Store all payment records in a Payment model (user, course, amount, status, provider_ref).
Store API schema in Memory MCP under key 'payment_api_contracts'.
Never log or store raw card data — use provider tokens only.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Test payments succeed and fail correctly in sandbox mode.
Enrollment is created only after verified payment.
No sensitive payment data is stored in MySQL.

tasks.title: Automated Email Confirmation System
tasks.description: Implement automated transactional email sending for purchase confirmations.
instructions: Configure Django email backend using SMTP (Gmail/SendGrid) via environment variables.
Create an email service utility: send_purchase_confirmation(user, course, payment).
Email must include: course name, amount, transaction ID, access link, and support contact.
Use Django signals or direct call from S2-T1 payment verification view.
Create HTML email template with platform branding.
Store email config spec in Memory MCP under key 'email_service_config'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Email is sent within 30 seconds of confirmed payment.
Email renders correctly in Gmail, Outlook.
No email is sent for failed payments.

tasks.title: Video Streaming API with Dynamic Watermarking
tasks.description: Build secure video streaming with access control and dynamic watermarks showing student name and phone.
instructions: Build GET /api/video/:video_id/stream/ — verify enrollment before serving stream URL.
Generate time-limited signed URLs for video segments (expire in 1 hour).
Implement server-side watermark overlay using FFmpeg or PIL: overlay student's name and phone number at semi-transparent position on video frames.
Store watermark configuration in the Enrollment model (student name, phone).
Reject stream requests from unenrolled students with HTTP 403.
Rotate watermark position periodically to prevent screen capture hiding.
Store streaming API spec in Memory MCP under key 'video_streaming_contracts'.
Performance note: Cache signed URLs per session to reduce signing overhead.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Unenrolled students cannot access video.
Watermark displays correct student identity on all streamed frames.
Signed URLs expire correctly.
Streaming is smooth (< 2s latency on standard network).

tasks.title: Online Test Module Backend
tasks.description: Build the complete test creation, delivery, and response storage backend.
instructions: Create models: Test, Question (MCQ/Descriptive), TestAttempt, Response.
Build GET /api/tests/:test_id/ — serve questions to enrolled students only.
Build POST /api/tests/:test_id/submit/ — receive, validate, and store responses.
For MCQ: auto-grade on submission and store score.
For Descriptive: store response text for NLP evaluation (queue for AI processing).
Enforce time limits: reject submissions after test duration expires.
Store full test API schema in Memory MCP under key 'test_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Only enrolled students can access tests.
MCQ auto-grading is accurate.
Descriptive responses are stored and flagged for AI evaluation.
Late submissions are rejected.

tasks.title: Course Purchase Frontend UI
tasks.description: Build end-to-end course purchase flow from course detail page to payment confirmation.
instructions: Retrieve payment API contracts from Memory MCP key 'payment_api_contracts'.
Build Course Detail page with: description, curriculum, instructor bio, price, and 'Enroll Now' button.
On 'Enroll Now', call POST /api/payments/initiate/ and render the payment provider's checkout widget.
On payment success callback, call POST /api/payments/verify/ and show confirmation screen.
On failure, show user-friendly error with retry option.
Redirect to enrolled course dashboard after confirmation.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint2/feature-agent/course-purchase-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Full purchase flow works end-to-end in sandbox mode.
User is enrolled and redirected correctly after payment.
Error states are handled gracefully.

tasks.title: Video Player Frontend
tasks.description: Build the secure video player component that streams watermarked lecture content.
instructions: Retrieve video streaming API spec from Memory MCP key 'video_streaming_contracts'.
Build a custom HTML5 video player with: play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen, playback speed controls.
Disable right-click context menu and developer tools keyboard shortcuts on the player.
Display a watermark overlay in the browser layer as an additional visual deterrent.
Handle 403 errors (unenrolled) with a clear 'Purchase Course to Access' CTA.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint2/frontend-agent/video-player-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Video plays smoothly from signed streaming URL.
Browser-layer watermark is visible.
Right-click and DevTools keyboard shortcuts are disabled.

tasks.title: Online Test Frontend Interface
tasks.description: Build the student-facing test-taking interface with timer, question navigation, and submission.
instructions: Retrieve test API contracts from Memory MCP key 'test_api_contracts'.
Build Test Interface: display question list, MCQ radio buttons, descriptive text areas, question navigator sidebar.
Implement a visible countdown timer that auto-submits when time expires.
Prevent tab switching (show warning overlay when user leaves the page).
After submission, show results immediately for MCQ, 'Under Review' for descriptive.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint2/frontend-agent/test-interface-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Timer counts down accurately and triggers auto-submit.
All question types render and capture responses correctly.
Tab-switch warning is triggered on focus loss.

tasks.title: Initial NLP Chatbot Integration
tasks.description: Deploy initial NLP-based chatbot trained on lecture transcripts for student doubt resolution.
instructions: Process collected lecture transcripts: clean, tokenize, and build a vector store (e.g., FAISS or ChromaDB).
Implement a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) pipeline: retrieve relevant transcript chunks, generate answer.
Build POST /api/chatbot/ask/ — accept student question, return chatbot answer + source context.
Implement fallback response: 'I'm not sure about that yet. Please ask your instructor.' when confidence is low.
Build chat UI widget: floating bubble, message history, typing indicator.
Store chatbot API spec in Memory MCP under key 'chatbot_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Chatbot answers at least 70% of lecture-related questions correctly in testing.
Fallback triggers correctly for out-of-scope questions.
Chat widget is accessible from all pages.

tasks.title: Sprint 2 Code Review & Integration Gate
tasks.description: Review all Sprint 2 PRs with emphasis on payment security, video DRM, and AI integration.
instructions: Review PRs: S2-T1 through S2-T8.
Payment PR: Verify no raw card data stored, signature verification is robust, sandbox mode only.
Video PR: Confirm access control on streaming endpoint, watermark logic is correct.
Test PR: Verify enrollment gate and time-limit enforcement.
Chatbot PR: Check no sensitive transcript data is exposed in API responses.
Categorize all comments as [BLOCKER], [SUGGESTION], [PRAISE].
Store outcomes in Memory MCP under key 'sprint2_review_outcomes'.
Approve only when all BLOCKERs resolved.
acceptance_criteria: All Sprint 2 PRs approved.
Payment and video security BLOCKERs have zero tolerance.
Review outcomes in Memory MCP.

sprints.name: Analytics, Engagement & Intelligence
sprints.goal: Add performance analytics, progress tracking, enhanced chatbot, notifications, and course expiry.

tasks.title: ML Performance Analytics Backend
tasks.description: Build ML-powered performance analysis identifying weak areas and predicting student outcomes.
instructions: Implement an ML prediction model (scikit-learn or PyTorch) trained on historical test response data.
Model inputs: question difficulty, response time, score, topic tags. Output: weak area classification + performance score.
Build GET /api/analytics/student/:id/ — return: topic scores, weak areas, trend over time, predicted grade.
Build GET /api/analytics/course/:id/ — instructor view: class average, score distribution, top/bottom performers.
Schedule background job (Celery or Django-Q) to re-run analytics after each test submission.
Store analytics API contracts in Memory MCP under key 'analytics_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Weak areas are identified with at least 75% accuracy on test data.
Analytics update within 5 minutes of test submission.
Instructor and student views return distinct, correct data sets.

tasks.title: Recommendation Engine for Personalized Learning
tasks.description: Build a recommendation model that suggests adaptive study materials based on performance.
instructions: Implement collaborative filtering or content-based recommendation model.
Inputs: student weak areas (from S3-T1), enrolled courses, completed topics.
Build GET /api/recommendations/:student_id/ — return list of suggested videos, topics, and practice tests.
Integrate Reinforcement Learning (RL) loop: reward signal from post-recommendation test score improvements.
Build POST /api/adaptive/adjust/ — dynamically adjust question difficulty for a student's next test.
Store recommendation API spec in Memory MCP under key 'recommendation_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Recommendations are personalized per student (not generic).
RL loop adjusts difficulty correctly after 3+ test attempts.
API response time < 500ms.

tasks.title: Student Progress Tracking Dashboard
tasks.description: Build the student-facing progress dashboard with full analytics visualizations.
instructions: Retrieve analytics API contracts from Memory MCP key 'analytics_api_contracts'.
Retrieve recommendation API contracts from Memory MCP key 'recommendation_api_contracts'.
Build dashboard sections: (1) Overall Performance Score, (2) Topic Breakdown radar/bar chart, (3) Test History table, (4) Weak Area Highlights, (5) Personalized Recommendations panel.
Use Recharts or Chart.js for all visualizations.
Make all charts interactive: hover tooltips, click-to-drill-down.
Ensure real-time-ish data (poll or websocket for updates after test submission).
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 dashboard sections render with live data.
Charts are interactive and accessible.
Data refreshes after test submission without full page reload.

tasks.title: Chatbot Enhancement with Additional Transcripts
tasks.description: Retrain and improve chatbot with expanded transcript data and better response quality.
instructions: Collect and clean additional lecture transcripts from all available courses.
Re-index the vector store with new transcript data.
Improve prompt engineering: add system role, context window management, and citation of source lecture.
Implement conversation memory: chatbot retains last 5 turns of context per session.
Add 'Was this helpful?' feedback buttons; store feedback in DB for future training.
Update chatbot API to return source_lecture field in response.
Store updated chatbot spec in Memory MCP under key 'chatbot_api_contracts_v2'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Chatbot accuracy improves to 85%+ on test queries.
Conversation context maintained across 5-turn sessions.
Feedback mechanism stores data correctly.

tasks.title: Notification System
tasks.description: Build a notification system for course updates, new content, and upcoming tests.
instructions: Create Notification model: user, type (TEST_REMINDER, COURSE_UPDATE, EXPIRY_WARNING), message, is_read, created_at.
Build POST /api/notifications/send/ (Admin/Instructor only) — create and push notifications.
Build GET /api/notifications/ — return paginated unread/all notifications for current user.
Build PATCH /api/notifications/:id/read/ — mark notification as read.
Implement automated triggers: notify 24h before test start, notify when new module added.
Build notification bell UI component with unread badge count.
Store notification API spec in Memory MCP under key 'notification_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Test reminder fires exactly 24h before test.
Unread badge count updates in real time.
Only Instructors/Admins can send broadcast notifications.

tasks.title: Course Validity & Expiry System
tasks.description: Add course access validity periods and automated expiry logic.
instructions: Add valid_until field to Enrollment model (default: 365 days from purchase).
Update all video streaming and test access checks to verify enrollment is not expired.
Run a daily background job to flag expired enrollments and trigger EXPIRY_WARNING notifications 7 days before expiry.
Build GET /api/enrollments/my/ — return enrollment list with remaining_days field.
Add course expiry status badge to student dashboard and course listing.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Expired enrollment blocks video and test access immediately.
7-day warning notification fires correctly.
Remaining days displayed accurately.

tasks.title: Sprint 3 Code Review & Integration Gate
tasks.description: Review all Sprint 3 PRs focusing on ML model accuracy, dashboard data integrity, and notification reliability.
instructions: Review PRs: S3-T1 through S3-T6.
Analytics PR: Verify ML model is not leaking test data into training, outputs are reasonable.
Recommendation PR: Confirm RL loop has no infinite reward exploitation.
Dashboard PR: Verify charts use live API data, not hardcoded mock.
Notification PR: Ensure only authorized roles can send broadcast notifications.
Expiry PR: Confirm expired enrollments block access at the API level, not just UI.
Store outcomes in Memory MCP under key 'sprint3_review_outcomes'.
acceptance_criteria: All Sprint 3 PRs approved.
ML data leakage confirmed absent.
Authorization checks confirmed at API level.

sprints.name: Finalization, Administration & Deployment
sprints.goal: Complete admin dashboard, harden security, polish UI, conduct full system testing, and deploy.

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard Backend APIs
tasks.description: Build comprehensive admin backend APIs for system-wide reporting and management.
instructions: Build GET /api/admin/overview/ — total users, active enrollments, revenue, courses count.
Build GET /api/admin/users/ — paginated user list with role filter, search, last active.
Build GET /api/admin/courses/analytics/ — per-course enrollment count, revenue, avg score.
Build GET /api/admin/system/health/ — API response times, DB query count, error rate.
All admin endpoints must require ADMIN role (verify RBAC from Memory MCP 'rbac_matrix').
Store admin API contracts in Memory MCP under key 'admin_api_contracts'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: All endpoints 403 for Student/Instructor roles.
Overview stats are accurate within 1% of raw DB counts.
Health endpoint returns < 200ms.

tasks.title: Admin Dashboard Frontend
tasks.description: Build the complete admin dashboard interface with reporting, user management, and analytics.
instructions: Retrieve admin API contracts from Memory MCP key 'admin_api_contracts'.
Build Admin Dashboard layout: sidebar navigation (Overview, Users, Courses, Reports, System Health).
Overview page: KPI cards (Total Users, Revenue, Active Enrollments) + line chart (signups over time).
Users page: searchable/filterable data table, click to view user profile, ability to deactivate account.
Courses Analytics page: table + bar chart of course performance.
System Health page: live API latency gauge, error rate chart.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint4/feature-agent/admin-dashboard-ui, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 sections render with live data.
User deactivation works end-to-end.
Dashboard is accessible only to Admin role.

tasks.title: Security Hardening & Authentication Validation
tasks.description: Comprehensive security hardening pass across all authentication and access control systems.
instructions: Implement rate limiting on all auth endpoints: max 10 login attempts per IP per 15 minutes.
Add CSRF protection on all state-changing endpoints.
Implement HTTP security headers: HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, CSP.
Audit all endpoints against OWASP Top 10: SQL injection, XSS, broken object-level authorization.
Add input sanitization and parameterized queries everywhere.
Implement account lockout after 5 failed logins with admin unlock.
Run Django's check --deploy and resolve all warnings.
Store security audit results in Memory MCP under key 'security_audit_results'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Rate limiting blocks brute force attempts.
OWASP Top 10 checklist is fully addressed.
Django --deploy check returns zero warnings.

tasks.title: UI Responsiveness & Cross-Browser Polish
tasks.description: Systematic UI responsiveness audit and polish across all platform pages.
instructions: Audit every page at breakpoints: 320px (mobile), 768px (tablet), 1280px (desktop), 1920px (large).
Fix all layout overflow, font scaling, and touch-target issues on mobile.
Standardize design tokens: color palette, typography scale, spacing system.
Ensure all interactive elements have focus states for keyboard accessibility (WCAG AA).
Add page transition animations for a polished feel.
Fix any broken layouts identified in S2-T7 (test interface) on mobile.
Create GitHub issue, branch sprint4/frontend-agent/ui-polish, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Zero layout overflows at any standard breakpoint.
All interactive elements are keyboard accessible.
Design is visually consistent across all pages.

tasks.title: Comprehensive System Testing
tasks.description: Full end-to-end system testing covering all user journeys, edge cases, and integration points.
instructions: Retrieve all API contracts from Memory MCP: auth, course, payment, video, test, analytics, chatbot, notification, admin.
Write and execute E2E test scripts covering: Student registration → course purchase → video viewing → test taking → results viewing.
Test Instructor journey: course creation → student enrollment monitoring → analytics viewing.
Test Admin journey: user management → course analytics → system health monitoring.
Test all security scenarios: unauthorized access, expired sessions, brute force, SQL injection attempts.
Test payment failure scenarios: declined card, network timeout, duplicate submission.
Document all bugs found in GitHub Issues with labels [BUG][CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW].
Fix all CRITICAL and HIGH bugs before sign-off.
Store test results summary in Memory MCP under key 'system_test_results'.
acceptance_criteria: All 3 user journey E2E tests pass.
Zero CRITICAL bugs in merged code.
All security scenarios return correct error responses.
Test results documented in Memory MCP.

tasks.title: Production Deployment & Final Handoff
tasks.description: Configure production deployment with environment hardening and monitoring.
instructions: Configure production Django settings: DEBUG=False, ALLOWED_HOSTS, SECURE_SSL_REDIRECT=True.
Set up Gunicorn + Nginx for production serving.
Configure environment variables in production: DB credentials, JWT secret, payment keys, email credentials.
Run collectstatic and configure media file serving.
Set up basic monitoring: Sentry for error tracking, uptime monitoring.
Tag release v4.0 on GitHub main branch.
Update README with complete setup, deployment, and API documentation.
Store final deployment checklist in Memory MCP under key 'deployment_checklist'.
Create GitHub issue, branch, open PR.
acceptance_criteria: Application accessible via HTTPS only.
All environment variables set (no hardcoded secrets in code).
Sentry capturing errors correctly.
GitHub release v4.0 tagged.

orchestrator_checklist_per_sprint: 1. Read all task instructions for the sprint from this tasks.json.
2. Check Memory MCP for any prior context, API contracts, and risk flags from previous sprints.
3. Spawn backend-agent for all backend tasks in parallel where dependencies allow.
4. Spawn frontend-agent for all frontend tasks in parallel where dependencies allow.
5. Spawn feature-agent for integration tasks only after their backend and frontend dependencies are merged.
6. After all feature PRs are open, spawn review-agent to conduct the sprint review gate.
7. Block merging until review-agent approves all PRs for the sprint.
8. After merge, update Memory MCP with sprint outcomes, performance metrics, and retrospective notes.
10. Begin next sprint planning using retrospective notes from Memory MCP.

memory_mcp_key_registry.db_schema_v1: MySQL schema definition — set in S1-T1
memory_mcp_key_registry.auth_api_contracts: Auth API request/response schemas — set in S1-T2
memory_mcp_key_registry.session_policy: Single-device session enforcement logic — set in S1-T3
memory_mcp_key_registry.rbac_matrix: Role permission matrix — set in S1-T4
memory_mcp_key_registry.course_api_contracts: Course listing API schemas — set in S1-T6
memory_mcp_key_registry.payment_api_contracts: Payment gateway API schemas — set in S2-T1
memory_mcp_key_registry.email_service_config: Email service configuration — set in S2-T2
memory_mcp_key_registry.video_streaming_contracts: Video streaming API spec — set in S2-T3
memory_mcp_key_registry.test_api_contracts: Test module API schemas — set in S2-T4
memory_mcp_key_registry.chatbot_api_contracts: Chatbot v1 API spec — set in S2-T8
memory_mcp_key_registry.analytics_api_contracts: Analytics API contracts — set in S3-T1
memory_mcp_key_registry.recommendation_api_contracts: Recommendation engine API spec — set in S3-T2
memory_mcp_key_registry.notification_api_contracts: Notification system API spec — set in S3-T5
memory_mcp_key_registry.chatbot_api_contracts_v2: Enhanced chatbot API spec — set in S3-T4
memory_mcp_key_registry.admin_api_contracts: Admin dashboard API contracts — set in S4-T1
memory_mcp_key_registry.security_audit_results: OWASP audit findings — set in S4-T3
memory_mcp_key_registry.system_test_results: E2E test results summary — set in S4-T5
memory_mcp_key_registry.deployment_checklist: Production deployment checklist — set in S4-T6

per_task: on_completion: create_pull_request(branch=task.branch, target=main, body='Closes #ISSUE_ID — task_id: TASK_ID')
per_sprint: After all PRs merged: create_release(tag=vSPRINT.0, title='Sprint N Complete', notes=summary_from_memory_mcp)

risk_mitigations.mitigation: All API schemas must be stored in Memory MCP BEFORE frontend agent starts. frontend-agent must read from Memory MCP before writing any API calls.
Cache signed URLs per session. Use async background processing for watermark generation. Set performance budget: stream latency < 2s.

risk_mitigations.risk: AI chatbot hallucination or inaccurate responses
risk_mitigations.mitigation: Implement confidence threshold: below 0.7 triggers fallback response. Log all queries and responses for weekly review.
Never store raw card data. review-agent must treat any payment security issue as BLOCKER with zero tolerance.
Mandatory OWASP Top 10 audit in S4-T3. Rate limiting and account lockout implemented.
